title: salix × saxetana
intro: Salix × saxatilis, also known as saxifrage willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the goat willow (Salix caprea). The medicinal properties of Salix × saxatilis lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its salicin content, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower fever, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Salix × saxatilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
